steps.title: Find the initial height
steps.content:
At release, $t=0$ and the height is $2{,}704$ feet. Substitute into the function:
$$h(0)=-16(0)^2+b=2{,}704$$
$$b=2{,}704$$

steps.title: Take the positive root
steps.content:
Time must be positive, so use the positive square root:
$$t=\sqrt{169}=13.00$$
The answer is B.
